svg.title: IGs88H architecture — orchestrator-driven recursive code analysis
svg.desc: Traversal engine recursively walks the code knowledge graph, dispatching an LLM analysis call at each node. Bottom-up and DFS recurse through the tree; BFS dispatches nodes in parallel via ThreadPoolExecutor. Each call goes through a multi-pass pipeline. The LLM is a pure analysis function — all traversal and spawning decisions are made by the orchestrator.
